ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-08-1988 and codicil dated Feb-12-1999 are admitted to probate. Christine Lee is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-01-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
